art_highlights: Global art market recovered by 4% in 2025, reaching $59.6 billion, with growth driven by high-end and auction recovery.
Trend: Shift toward human craftsmanship and emotional depth in contemporary art for 2026.
Fair recovery: Art fairs now account for 35% of dealer sales, the highest since 2022.
Gender representation: Women artists reach 50% of primary-market gallery rosters and 37% of sales by value.

market_trends.summary: Cautious optimism for 2026; high-value market segments rebounding significantly.
key_points: US leads market (44% share), followed by UK (18%) and China (14%).
Public auction sales increased 9% to $20.7 billion.
Online sales declined 11%, indicating a shift back to in-person channels.
